title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at SpiceJet Cargo - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at SpiceJet Cargo - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the SpiceJet Cargo family as a Distribution Manager in Kochi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About SpiceJet Cargo:
SpiceJet Cargo is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SpiceJet Cargo!
